task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat main workspace or Administration panel is visible, indicating the agent is no longer on the login screen.

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the REST API settings page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Administration Settings page is open, specifically showing the 'REST API' or 'CORS' configuration section.

task_completion.description: CORS is enabled in the settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The toggle or checkbox for 'Enable CORS' is in the ON or enabled position.

task_completion.description: The wildcard ('*') is removed from the CORS origins list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'CORS Origin' text input field does not contain the '*' character.

task_completion.description: The required target domains are added to the CORS origins list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'CORS Origin' text input field contains both 'https://hr-dashboard.internal' and 'https://intranet.mobile.corp' (typically comma-separated or on separate lines depending on the UI).
A 'Save changes' button is clicked, appears disabled/greyed out indicating no unsaved changes, or a success toast notification is visible.

integrity.description: Agent used the Rocket.Chat web interface to configure settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Rocket.Chat web UI in a browser, rather than terminal commands (like curl or mongo shell) or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine Rocket.Chat application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows a local or appropriate Rocket.Chat URL, and the interface matches the standard Rocket.Chat admin dashboard, not a text editor or mock page.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) pane is not open or being used to alter the DOM text to simulate completion.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target domains that must be present in the CORS Origin settings are exactly 'https://hr-dashboard.internal' and 'https://intranet.mobile.corp'. Ensure the wildcard '*' is completely removed from this field.
